intent_summary: Repair two audit failures in Signal Sweep blog monitor. SEED-001: seed_blog_urls.sql references columns (path, is_active, created_at) that do not exist on vendor.blog — rewrite to use source_url parsed into domain/path, is_accessible filter, original_created_at ordering. BRIDGE-001: change_bridge.py bridge_to_article_input() returns title=None, content=None, source='field_monitor' which fails ingest_article() validation — use source='company_blog' (valid ArticleSource enum), placeholder title/content that satisfy non-null validation. Do NOT modify ingest_article.py.
constraints: Do not expand scope beyond seed_blog_urls.sql and change_bridge.py
Do not modify ingest_article.py — use existing ArticleSource enum values
Do not modify existing movement_engine files
Preserve all kill switches and sample gates
Seed SQL must remain idempotent (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)
